queue_intent: Tranche 19 'Faction Content & Warfront Foundation' (20 gates). HEAD 334ef9a. Anchor: EPIC.S7.FACTION_MODEL. Epics: FACTION_MODEL, WARFRONT_THEATERS, WARFRONT_STATE, SUPPLY_IMPACT, INSTABILITY_PHASES (new).

tasks.intent: GalaxyGenerator seeds warfronts at world creation: 1 hot war (Valorin-Weaver territorial), 1 cold war (Concord-Chitin informational). Player starts in non-combatant space 2-3 hops from front. Contested nodes placed at faction borders.

tasks.title: GATE.S7.WARFRONT.DEMAND_SHOCK.001: Wartime demand multipliers
tasks.intent: NEW: WarfrontDemandSystem. Factions at war consume goods at elevated rates per WarfrontTweaksV0 (Munitions 3-5x, Composites 2-3x, Fuel 2-4x). Adjusts NPC consumption multiplier based on warfront intensity. Wire into SimKernel.Step().

tasks.title: GATE.S7.WARFRONT.TARIFF_SCALING.001: War surcharge on tariffs
tasks.intent: Update MarketSystem tariff calculation: EffectiveTariff = BaseTariff + (WarSurcharge * NodeWarfrontIntensity). Per-system, not per-faction. WarSurcharge values in WarfrontTweaksV0. Contract test for scaling.
